name: maze of pits
description: I'm in a maze of pits
items_start: Strange scratchings on rock says: `ALADIN was here`
hints: The Aladin scratching is a clue - think about what magic words Aladin might use.
Go NORTH or DOWN to reach room 17 where the Persian Rug treasure is located.
NORTH or DOWN leads to the Persian Rug (room 17). The Aladin reference hints at the magic carpet (rug) and the word AWAY.
notes: Central maze junction with many exits. The Aladin scratching hints at the flying carpet concept - the Persian Rug in room 17 can be used with SAY AWAY to teleport out. NORTH or DOWN leads to the rug.
